summary: Iteration F - LifeOS Priority 4/3/10 features testing. Backend: 23/23 tests pass (after fixing crypto_service bug). Frontend: All major features verified. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) /api/search 500 error (crypto_service undefined), (2) Insurance form 422 error (missing policy_type default). All Health, Finance, Search, Dark Mode, Mobile Nav features working.

critical.issue: FIXED: NameError: crypto_service not defined. Used crypto_service.decrypt() but only decrypt() was imported. Fixed by replacing all 4 occurrences with decrypt().

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Insurance form submits policy_type as undefined (not in form state since user never changes the default select). Backend InsurancePolicyIn requires policy_type (non-optional). Fixed by adding `policy_type: body.policy_type || 'term'` in the POST call.

issues: Recharts warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - console warnings appear on initial render before container is sized. Charts render correctly visually. Known Recharts/ResponsiveContainer issue when component mounts.
Budget form uses browser's native month picker (input[type='month']) instead of custom UI - minor design inconsistency but functional

Red highlight color (#FDF3F1) is very light and hard to distinguish from the page background (#F2F0E9) visually in screenshots. The bg color is technically correct per code but may need slightly stronger red tint for better visibility.

action_items: Recharts width/height warning: Consider adding minHeight to ResponsiveContainer wrappers in Health.jsx vitals/labs charts to avoid -1 dimension warnings on initial render
Finance.jsx: Check if similar default-select pattern affects other tabs (SIP status, RSU form fields). Though SIP/RSU models have Pydantic defaults so may not fail.
Insurance row red highlight: #FDF3F1 is very subtle against #F2F0E9 background - consider using a stronger red tint like bg-red-50 or adding a left-border indicator for better visual feedback
critical_code_review_comments: server.py global_search (lines 1858-1890): All 4 uses of crypto_service.decrypt() were undefined - fixed. crypto_service was never instantiated/imported as object; only decrypt() function was imported from services.crypto_service.

Finance.jsx insurance POST call (line 200): policy_type was not sent with default fallback. InsurancePolicyIn.policy_type is a required field with no default. Fixed by adding policy_type: body.policy_type || 'term'.

Pattern risk: Several Finance tabs use select fields where form state starts as {} (empty). The pattern `<select value={form.x || 'default'}>` shows a default in UI but form.x remains undefined until user changes it. On submit, body.x is undefined. This works ONLY when the Pydantic model has a Python default (like status='active'). It fails when the Pydantic field is required (no default). Review all select fields with required Pydantic fields.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/Finance.jsx (insurance POST call - added policy_type default fallback)

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all core features working, 2 bugs fixed in testing

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up: 3 weight vitals (71-73 kg), 2 test insurance policies. All test data removed after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration F tested all Priority 3/4/10 LifeOS features. Backend 23/23 passing. Frontend all core flows verified. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) global_search crypto_service NameError in server.py - replaced with decrypt(). (2) Insurance form 422 - added policy_type default in Finance.jsx. Health sparklines/labs charts working. Finance budget tab and insurance expiry highlight working. Command palette search (after backend fix), dark mode, mobile nav all working. Recharts width/height warnings are cosmetic only. Pattern risk: Finance forms with required backend fields and select defaults (without form state init) may have similar 422 issues - review SIP/RSU submit handlers.

crypto_service_error.root_cause: global_search function uses crypto_service.decrypt() but crypto_service is not defined anywhere. The import on line 27 is `from services.crypto_service import encrypt_doc, decrypt_doc, decrypt_list, encrypt, decrypt` - only the decrypt() function was imported, not a class instance named crypto_service.
crypto_service_error.fix_applied: Replaced all 4 occurrences of crypto_service.decrypt(x) with decrypt(x) in global_search function

insurance_form_422.issue: Insurance form in Finance tab fails with 422 on save
insurance_form_422.root_cause: React form state initialized as {} (empty). The insurance type select shows 'term' as default via `value={form.policy_type || 'term'}` in JSX, BUT form.policy_type is never set in state unless user changes the select. On submit, body = {...form, ...} sends policy_type as undefined. FastAPI's InsurancePolicyIn.policy_type is required (non-optional, no default). Request fails with 422.
insurance_form_422.reproduction: Go to Finance > Insurance tab > Add > fill only Insurer > Save → 422
insurance_form_422.fix_applied: Added `policy_type: body.policy_type || 'term'` in the insurance api.post() call in Finance.jsx submitAdd()
